emails.subject: Re: 565226
emails.body: Re: 565226 I've left a message for Stewart Rosman, the mid-marketer who did this deal, to find out whether or not he wants this confirmed. Diana Scholtes said she thought he did, in which case I need to determine with him what kind of deal this should be, and we'd need to confirm the first leg. I'll let you know as soon as I hear back from him. Thanks, Kate From: Sharen Cason 04/26/2001 03:08 PM
